evals.expected_output: literature-map.md created with all 5 test-project papers grouped into 2-3 themes. Each paper has a project-situated annotation. Diff shown before writing.

assertions.name: all_papers_included
assertions.description: All 5 papers appear in literature-map.md (all 5 slugs present)

assertions.name: annotations_present
assertions.description: Each paper entry has an annotation (project-specific sentence, not just the header line)

assertions.name: diff_shown_before_write
assertions.description: Skill shows a diff and asks confirmation before writing

assertions.name: no_cross_project_papers
assertions.description: Only test-project papers appear — no papers from other projects

evals.expected_output: Existing literature-map.md (3 papers: smith2023, wu2024, brown2020) gets 2 new papers appended (chen2022, liu2021) under a 'Recent additions' section or existing themes. The 3 already-mapped papers are NOT duplicated.

assertions.name: new_papers_added
assertions.description: chen2022-pore-geometry and liu2021-gcmc-polymer appear in the updated map

assertions.name: existing_not_duplicated
assertions.description: smith2023-zeolite-adsorption appears exactly once (not added again)

assertions.name: existing_themes_preserved
assertions.description: Existing theme sections (DFT adsorption methodology, Environmental context) remain unchanged
